title: Explain Persona
short_answer: Persona is the behavior profile the assistant uses when answering.
text: In this app, persona controls the assistant's speaking style, tone, identity, and behavior rules. Persona profiles live under app/personas/profiles.

title: Explain Profile
short_answer: Profile is the saved config file for a persona.
text: A persona profile stores the details that shape how the assistant acts. If you want to edit a persona, check app/personas/profiles.

title: Explain Active Persona
short_answer: Active Persona is the persona currently being used by the assistant.
text: The active persona is loaded during app startup and can also be stored in runtime state. It decides which persona profile is used for answers.

title: Explain Persona Prompt
short_answer: Persona Prompt is the instruction text that shapes how a persona talks.
text: If you want to change how a persona answers, edit the persona profile or prompt content inside app/personas/profiles. This affects style, tone, and response behavior.

title: Explain Personas Folder
short_answer: app/personas is the folder that owns persona profiles and persona services.
text: The personas folder stores and loads assistant behavior profiles. Use this area when changing who the assistant is, how it talks, or which profile is active.

title: Explain Profiles Folder
short_answer: Profiles Folder is where persona profile files live.
text: In this app, persona profiles are expected under app/personas/profiles. If you want to edit Rick or another persona, this is the first place to check.

title: Explain Persona Service
short_answer: Persona Service loads and resolves persona profiles for the app.
text: Persona Service is the code layer that finds the active persona and loads its profile. Other blocks should use this service instead of guessing persona files manually.

title: Explain Rick
short_answer: Rick is one persona profile used by the assistant.
text: Rick is a persona choice for the assistant's behavior and tone. If Rick sounds wrong, check the Rick profile inside app/personas/profiles.

title: Explain Persona Change
short_answer: Persona Change means switching which profile the assistant uses.
text: To change persona cleanly, update the active persona setting or runtime state through the proper persona/service path. Do not hardcode persona behavior inside random runners.

title: Explain Persona Voice
short_answer: Persona Voice is the speaking style associated with a persona.
text: Persona and voice should stay conceptually separate. Persona controls behavior and tone, while TTS or voice settings control the actual audio voice.
